user.title: Configure SolarManager MyStrom Bridge
user.description: Connect a virtual MyStrom Energy Control Switch device.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the virtual MyStrom device.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the device for state updates. Default: 5

power.title: Power Source (optional)
power.description: Optionally select a Home Assistant sensor entity whose state (in W) will be forwarded to the virtual device's power endpoint. Leave empty to skip.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the virtual MyStrom device. Please check the IP address / hostname.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the device for state updates.
data_description.power_entity_id: Sensor whose state (in W) is forwarded to the device's /power endpoint.
